description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house set within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a main building with a prominent gable roof and several attached and detached structures. The main house has expansive windows, a covered front entryway with a walkway, and a spacious backyard with a patio area. There is a detached garage or outbuilding at the rear, a circular driveway, and a small garden area with trees and shrubs. The property includes a paved patio, outdoor seating, and a possible pool or water feature. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials with gray roofing, and the lot is bordered by a low wall. The overall design is symmetrical and orderly, with clear separation between the main house and auxiliary structures.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a gable roof, expansive windows, and a fenced yard featuring a detached garage, patio, and landscaped garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, walkway, and a detached outbuilding at the rear.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the detached garage, and the spacious backyard with patio and pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, large windows, patio area, and garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side yard, and the relationship between the main house and detached structures.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front entry with steps, walkway, and a small porch; simple columns and a prominent front door.
